case_title: JIREN MOSQUEDA VS. GMJ GIFT SHOP, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSQUEDA, JIREN AS TO DEFENDANT GMJ GIFT SHOP, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP KRUPNIK, MARINA AS INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNERS OF GMJ GIFT SHOP, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SRULOVICH, NELYA AS INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNERS OF GMJ GIFT SHOP, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSQUEDA, JIREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GMJ GIFT SHOP, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP KRUPNIK, MARINA AS INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNERS OF GMJ GIFT SHOP, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SRULOVICH, NELYA AS INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNERS OF GMJ GIFT SHOP, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,325.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
